descriptionTemplate: Salvador gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Place 1 {Sanctuary of Mercy} into hand. At the end of the turn, gain [Power:Arg2] {STR}.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Salvador gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Place 1 {Sanctuary of Mercy} into hand. At turn end, gain [Power:Arg2] {STR}. {Crimson Furnace} accumulated by {He Who Protects} and {Blessed are the Bones} +25%, and when {Liberation} is selected for {End of Suffering}, every 1% of Max HP consumed from {Crimson Furnace} grants +5% Final DMG.
